Description: PETG thin shell 1.2mm wall — print as open shell sections
Notes: Print 6 sections. Insert cable-route straws before assembly.

Description: X-30 expanding PU foam 2 lb/ft³ (0.032 g/cm³) — pour into shell voids
Notes: 2-part, 2-min pot life, 4× expansion. Net foam vol 1309 cm³ after 18% internals deduction.

Description: CF keel + ring frames
Notes: 3mm CF plate keel + 2mm ring frames at 5 stations

Description: Cable-route tubes 5mm OD × 400mm (drink-straw diameter)
Notes: Insert before foam pour. Routes: CAN, RS-485, 1553, ETH×2, power

Description: EPS blue foam board 25mm × 300mm × 150mm — void former material
Notes: Owens Corning Foamular 150 or equivalent. Cut to 6 void-former shapes per build guide step 22.

Description: Johnson's Paste Wax 16oz tin — void-former release agent
Notes: Consumed, not airborne weight. Apply 2 coats to all EPS void-former surfaces before foam pour.

Description: PTFE tube 5mm OD × 3mm ID × 2.5m — cable conduit through foam
Notes: 6 conduits: CAN, RS-485, 1553, ETH-A, ETH-B, PWR. Install before foam pour. Total 12g stays in airframe.

Description: Access panel frame set — PETG 100% infill, 2mm wall — 6 frames + 6 lids
Notes: Print from access_panel_frames.stl (TBD). Bond frames into hull with 5-min epoxy before foam pour. Lids are removable.

Description: M2.5×6 SS button-head Phillips — access panel screws
Notes: 4 per panel for panels B and E. Panels A and F use bayonet. Panel C uses hinge. Panel D uses magnets.

Description: N42 neodymium disc magnet 6×2mm — panel D magnetic closure
Notes: 4 in panel frame + 4 in panel lid. Press-fit into 6.1mm printed pockets.

Description: 3M 4016 closed-cell foam gasket tape 1.5mm × 9mm × 3m roll
Notes: Line all panel frame lips before foam pour. Provides dust/moisture seal and prevents foam intrusion into void.

Description: 5-minute epoxy 25mL syringe — frame-to-hull bond
Notes: Consumed during build. Bond access-panel frames into hull sections before foam pour step.

Description: 80mm EDF nacelle LEFT (PORT) — 6S
Notes: OD 93.5mm (canonical nacelle OD), 1.2mm wall pod

Description: 80mm EDF nacelle RIGHT (STBD) — 6S
XFLY Galaxy X4 PRO 40mm 12-blade EDF — 1413-KV5850 outrunner — 3S/4S rated
Notes: Powered at 4S (14.8–16.5V) via balance tap from 6S main pack (cells 1–4). 12-blade design gives 650g thrust at only 30A — better efficiency than 8-blade alternatives. Factory-balanced, outrunner runs cooler than inrunner formats. RPM ceiling safe: 5850KV×16.8V=98,280 no-load; under load ~83,500 RPM vs 95,500 RPM tip-speed limit. Mounted in engine bell section 83–100% station. Variable-area nozzle (BamJr remix CC BY 4.0). Selected over AEORC XDF40 8600KV (819g peak but 68A, needs 70–80A ESC, reported ESC failures) and AEORC 6500KV (575g, 41A). XFLY PRO gives 650g at only 30A — best thrust-per-amp in class.

Description: 6S→4S balance tap pigtail — JST-XH cells 1–4 to XT30 ESC input
Notes: Taps cells 1–4 of 6S balance connector to feed fuselage ESC at 4S (14.8–16.8V). Fuselage EDF is trim thrust only — average current ~15–25A — so differential discharge across cells 1–4 vs 5–6 is small (~2% capacity delta per 10-min flight). Balancer corrects on every charge cycle. Use 16 AWG wire, 150mm length.

Description: 50A BLHeli32 ESC for 80mm nacelle EDF — 6S rated
Notes: One per nacelle. 6S = 22.2V nominal.

Description: 40A BLHeli32 ESC for XFLY X4 PRO fuselage EDF — 4S rated
Notes: 4S input from balance tap (14.8–16.5V). XFLY PRO peaks at 30A — 40A ESC provides 33% headroom. BLHeli32 for smooth throttle response during altitude trim. Lighter than 50A part due to lower current spec.

Description: Nacelle pod shell PETG — 80mm ID, 93.5mm OD, 144mm long
Nacelle tip cap PORT — RED WS2812C nav light recess
Nacelle tip cap STBD — GREEN WS2812C nav light recess
CF stub arm 12mm OD 1.5mm wall 10.4mm long
Notes: ARM_STUB = INNER − MAX_HW = 10.4mm

Description: Nacelle tilt pivot bracket CF-PETG
MG90S nacelle tilt servo — 120° bracket modification
Notes: 50Hz PWM. Travel extended to 120° via bracket geometry: 0°=VTOL, 90°=fwd flight, 120°=reverse thrust (30° past horizontal). MG90S physical range supports this; bracket hard-stop at 120°. FC soft-limits: 0–90° normal mode, 90–115° reverse/brake mode.

Description: Gear nozzle assembly — sector gear + ring + 8 flaps (BamJr CC BY 4.0)
Notes: 2 nacelle + 1 fuselage. Sector gear drives ring via bevel chain.

Description: SG90 variable-nozzle servo
Array A — ST VL53L5CX 8×8 multizone ToF sensors — Node 3, Panel D
Notes: S1A Forward sta 25mm, S2A Aft sta 440mm, S3A Port sta 200mm, S4A Stbd sta 200mm, S5A Zenith sta 180mm, S6A Nadir sta 160mm. Each flush-mounted behind 5mm PMMA window. I2C bus: Node 3 I2C3.

Description: Array A — TCA9548A 8-channel I2C mux
Notes: I2C address 0x70. Channels 0–5 select S1A–S6A. Shared PCB with MCP23008-A. Node 3 I2C3 (Panel D).

Description: Array A — MCP23008 8-port I2C GPIO expander — XSHUT control
Notes: I2C address 0x20. GP0–GP5 drive XSHUT for S1A–S6A. Boot: all low → enable one, assign 0x54–0x59, disable. Node 3 I2C3 (Panel D).

Description: Array A — Sensor PETG flush-mount ×6
Notes: Press-fit 6.5mm hull cutout. 0.5mm PMMA disc UV-adhesive over aperture.

Description: Array A — VL53L5CX cable 4-wire JST-SH1.0 300mm
Notes: Route through foam conduit to Panel D bay. GND/VCC/SDA/SCL.

Description: Array B — ST VL53L5CX 8×8 multizone ToF sensors — Node 2, Panel B
Notes: S1B Forward sta 40mm, S2B Aft sta 425mm, S3B Port sta 150mm, S4B Stbd sta 150mm, S5B Zenith sta 260mm, S6B Nadir sta 220mm. Spatially offset from Array A for different blind-spot profiles. I2C bus: Node 2 I2C2.

Description: Array B — TCA9548A 8-channel I2C mux
Notes: I2C address 0x70 on Node 2 I2C2 — electrically isolated from Array A bus. Channels 0–5 select S1B–S6B. Panel B bay.

Description: Array B — MCP23008 8-port I2C GPIO expander — XSHUT control
Notes: I2C address 0x20 on Node 2 I2C2. GP0–GP5 drive XSHUT for S1B–S6B. Boot sequence identical to Array A but on separate bus. Panel B bay.

Description: Array B — Sensor PETG flush-mount ×6
Notes: Same print as Array A mounts. Different hull cutout positions per Array B station offsets.

Description: Array B — VL53L5CX cable 4-wire JST-SH1.0 300mm
Notes: Route through separate foam conduit to Panel B bay. Do NOT commingle with Array A harness.

Description: SiK 915MHz telemetry radio module
Notes: On COMMS-HAT-SWITCH, SMA belly antenna

Description: 49MHz RCRS RC receiver/transmitter board
Notes: Dorsal fin antenna, coil cavity

Description: u-blox M10Q GPS module + patch antenna
Notes: 59mm from nose, cockpit top

Description: 915MHz SMA whip antenna + pigtail
49MHz helical coil + enclosure (dorsal fin)
WS2812C addressable LED + diffuser + mount
Notes: Port=RED, Stbd=GREEN, Tail=WHITE, Belly=WHITE strobe

Description: M2.5 nylon hex standoffs 6mm ×20
M2.5 stainless screws ×40 (8mm + 12mm assorted)
Nylon zip ties ×30 (100mm + 200mm)
3M double-sided foam tape — vibration isolation mounts
Cable management clips + mounts
